title: BedWars Utility Pack
description: A clean and minimalist UI resource pack for Minecraft that improves hearts, hunger icons, crosshair, and overall HUD for a smoother and more modern gameplay experience.
body:
Clean UI Pack is a simple and lightweight resource pack for Minecraft that focuses on improving the in-game user interface while keeping the original vanilla style.

This pack redesigns key HUD elements to make them cleaner, more readable, and visually appealing without changing the core gameplay. It is perfect for players who want a modern and minimal look while still enjoying the classic Minecraft experience.

Features:
Redesigned hearts (health bar) with a clean, flat style
Simplified hunger icons for better visibility
Minimalist crosshair for improved aiming
Cleaner hotbar and UI elements
Lightweight and performance-friendly

The goal of this pack is not to drastically change the game, but to remove visual clutter and create a smoother and more enjoyable interface.

Why use this pack?
Better visibility during gameplay
Cleaner and more modern UI
Simple and easy to use
Works well for both casual and PvP players

Just install the resource pack and enjoy a cleaner Minecraft experience.
